segments.text: I cry aloud to the Lord; I lift up my voice to the Lord for mercy.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I pour out before him my complaint; before him I tell my trouble.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: When my spirit grows faint within me, it is you who watch over my way. In the path where I walk people have hidden a snare for me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Look and see, there is no one at my right hand; no one is concerned for me. I have no refuge; no one cares for my life.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I cry to you, Lord; I say, 'You are my refuge, my portion in the land of the living.'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Listen to my cry, for I am in desperate need; rescue me from those who pursue me, for they are too strong for me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Set me free from my prison, that I may praise your name. Then the righteous will gather about me because of your goodness to me.
segments.speaker: David
